sql: SELECT SUM(f.BRUT_PRIM_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_EK f ON p.POLICE_ID = f.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE t.TARIH = 2025 FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Uses BRUT_PRIM_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_EK joined with POL_POLICE_OZET via POLICE_ID and filtered by TANZIM_TARIH_ID matching 2025.
risk_notes: Relies on TANZIM_TARIH_ID and BRUT_PRIM_TL being valid and correctly joined.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies created in the year 2025?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, FACT_POL_POLICE_EK, GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the BRUT_PRIM_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: BRUT_PRIM_TL represents the gross premium amount in Turkish Lira.

sql: SELECT SUM(f.VOP_TL) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET f ON p.POLICE_ID = f.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE t.TARIH = 2025 FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Calculates total production using VOP_TL from FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET joined with POL_POLICE_OZET via POLICE_ID and filtered by TANZIM_TARIH_ID matching 2025.
risk_notes: Assumes VOP_TL is the correct measure for production and that joins are valid.
description:
Question answered: What is the total production (in TL) for policies created in the year 2025?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, FACT_POL_POLICE_TEM_ASSET, GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the VOP_TL column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: VOP_TL represents the value of the policy premium in Turkish Lira.

sql: SELECT SUM(s.POLICE_SAYISI) AS total_üretim FROM AS_DWH.POL_POLICE_OZET p JOIN AS_DWH.POLICE_SAYISI s ON p.POLICE_ID = s.POLICE_ID JOIN AS_DWH.GNL_TARIH t ON p.TANZIM_TARIH_ID = t.TARIH_ID WHERE t.TARIH = 2025 FETCH FIRST 200 ROWS ONLY
rationale_short: Counts total production via POLICE_SAYISI from POLICE_SAYISI joined with POL_POLICE_OZET via POLICE_ID and filtered by TANZIM_TARIH_ID matching 2025.
risk_notes: Uses POLICE_SAYISI as a proxy for production; assumes it reflects actual production volume.
description:
Question answered: What is the total number of policies created in the year 2025?
Tables used: POL_POLICE_OZET, POLICE_SAYISI, GNL_TARIH
Filters: Policies created in the year 2025
Grouping/measures: Summing the POLICE_SAYISI column
Expected output columns: total_üretim
Assumptions: POLICE_SAYISI represents the count of policies.
